topics.title: Trump's Political Maneuvering
topics.summary: Donald Trump is actively engaging in political strategies, including endorsing candidates and criticizing fellow Republicans. His recent posts highlight his disdain for certain politicians and his focus on promoting his agenda, such as the Anti-Weaponization Fund and the Sunshine Protection Act. Trump's involvement in endorsing candidates for various positions shows his continued influence within the Republican Party.
topics.summaryZh: 唐纳德·特朗普积极参与政治策略，包括支持候选人和批评共和党同僚。他最近的帖子突显了他对某些政治家的不满，以及他对推动自己的议程（如反武器化基金和阳光保护法案）的关注。特朗普对各个职位候选人的支持显示了他在共和党内的持续影响力。

topics.title: Military Deployments and Foreign Policy
topics.summary: Trump's announcement of deploying 5,000 troops to Poland indicates a significant shift in U.S. military strategy and foreign policy. This move has garnered attention and sparked discussions about its implications for NATO and U.S.-Iran relations. Trump's foreign policy decisions continue to be a focal point of his administration's agenda.
topics.summaryZh: 特朗普宣布向波兰部署5000名军队，表明美国军事战略和外交政策的重大转变。这一举动引起了关注，并引发了关于其对北约和美伊关系影响的讨论。特朗普的外交政策决定仍然是其政府议程的焦点。

topics.title: Public Sentiment and Economic Concerns
topics.summary: Recent polls indicate a decline in voter confidence regarding the economy, which could impact Trump's political standing. His responses to economic issues, including defending the DOJ fund and addressing inflation, reflect his awareness of public sentiment. The economic landscape remains a critical factor in his ongoing political narrative.
topics.summaryZh: 最近的民调显示，选民对经济的信心下降，这可能影响特朗普的政治地位。他对经济问题的回应，包括捍卫司法部资金和应对通货膨胀，反映了他对公众情绪的关注。经济形势仍然是他持续政治叙事的关键因素。

socialMedia.text: I gave up a lot of money in allowing the just announced Anti-Weaponization Fund to go forward. I could have settled my case, including the illegal release of my Tax Returns and the equally illegal BREAK IN of Mar-a-Lago, for an absolute fortune. Instead, I am helping others, who were so badly abused by an evil, corrupt, and weaponized Biden Administration, receive, at long last, JUSTICE! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 我放弃了很多钱，让刚刚宣布的反武器化基金得以推进。我本可以以绝对的财富解决我的案件，包括我税务申报表的非法泄露和马阿拉歌的同样非法的闯入。相反，我在帮助那些受到邪恶、腐败和武器化的拜登政府严重虐待的人，终于获得正义！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: Stephen Colbert’s firing from CBS was the “Beginning of the End” for untalented, nasty, highly overpaid, not funny, and very poorly rated Late Night Television Hosts. Others, of even less talent, to soon follow. May they all Rest in Peace! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 斯蒂芬·科尔伯特被CBS解雇是无才、恶劣、薪水过高、毫无幽默感且评价极差的深夜电视主持人的“终结之始”。其他更无才的人也将很快跟随。愿他们都安息！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: Stop playing games and PASS THE SAVE AMERICA ACT!
socialMedia.textZh: 停止玩游戏，尽快通过《拯救美国法案》！

socialMedia.text: People don’t remember that Thom Tillis, the weak and ineffective Senator from the Great State of North Carolina, a State I won, including primaries, 6 consecutive times, didn’t have the courage to fight it out in the Senate, remain in place, and run again for office, a thing he desperately wanted to do. I called him a “Nitpicker,” always fighting against the Republican Party, and ME, mostly on things that didn’t matter. When I told him that I would  not, under any circumstances, endorse him for another run, too much work and drama (he couldn’t have won, anyway!), he immediately quit the race and publicly announced that he was going to “retire.” I said, “Wow, great news, that was easy!” The media said how brave he was to take me on, but he wasn’t brave, he was just the opposite - HE WAS A QUITTER! Now he can have all the fun he wants for a few months, with some of his RINO friends, screwing the Republican Party. In the end it will only get bigger, and better, and stronger, than ever before!!! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 人们不记得汤姆·蒂利斯，这位来自我赢得的伟大北卡罗来纳州的软弱无能的参议员，连在参议院中争斗的勇气都没有，仍然留在原地，重新竞选，这是他非常想做的事情。我称他为“挑剔者”，总是反对共和党和我，主要是在一些无关紧要的事情上。当我告诉他在任何情况下都不会支持他再次竞选时，太多的工作和戏剧（反正他也赢不了！），他立即退出了竞选，并公开宣布他要“退休”。我说：“哇，太好了，这太简单了！”媒体说他敢于挑战我，但他并不勇敢，恰恰相反——他是个放弃者！现在他可以和他的一些RINO朋友们尽情玩乐几个月，破坏共和党。最终，它只会变得更大、更好、更强大！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: Glenn Jacobs has a BIG political future in Tennessee - A great guy!!! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 格伦·雅各布斯在田纳西州有一个伟大的政治未来——一个很棒的人！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: Colbert is finally finished at CBS. Amazing that he lasted so long! No talent, no ratings, no life. He was like a dead person. You could take any person off of the street and they would be better than this total jerk. Thank goodness he’s finally gone!
socialMedia.textZh: 科尔伯特在CBS终于结束了。他能坚持这么久真是令人惊讶！没有才华，没有收视率，没有生活。他就像一个死去的人。你可以从街上随便找一个人，他们都会比这个完全的混蛋好。感谢上天他终于走了！

socialMedia.text: RT @realDonaldTrumpIf Iran surrenders, admits their Navy is gone and resting at the bottom of the sea, and their Air Force is no longer with us, and if their entire Military walks out of Tehran, weapons dropped and hands held high, each shouting “I surrender, I surrender” while wildly waving the representative White Flag, and if their entire remaining Leadership signs all necessary “Documents of Surrender,” and admit their defeat to the great power and force of the magnificent U.S.A., The Failing New York Times, The China Street Journal (WSJ!), Corrupt and now Irrelevant CNN, and all other members of the Fake News Media, will headline that Iran had a Masterful and Brilliant Victory over The United States of America, it wasn’t even close. The Dumacrats and Media have totally lost their way. They have gone absolutely CRAZY!!! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 转发 @realDonaldTrump 如果伊朗投降，承认他们的海军已经消失，沉在海底，他们的空军不再存在，如果他们整个军队走出德黑兰，武器放下，双手高举，每个人都大喊“我投降，我投降”，同时疯狂挥舞代表性的白旗，如果他们剩下的所有领导人签署所有必要的“投降文件”，并承认他们对伟大的美国的强大力量的失败，失败的《纽约时报》，《华尔街日报》（WSJ！），腐败且现在无关紧要的CNN，以及所有其他假新闻媒体，将头条报道伊朗在对美国的战斗中取得了辉煌的胜利，根本没有接近。民主党和媒体完全迷失了方向。他们已经完全疯狂了！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: I love the Great State of South Carolina, won every one of my Races there by a landslide, and only want the BEST representing you in Elected Office!There’s this RINO Candidate in the Palmetto State named David Pascoe, a lifelong Democrat who previously endorsed Crooked Joe Biden for President, and served as a Biden Co-Chair in South Carolina, who is running in the Republican Primary to be your next Attorney General — Pascoe is a total fraud and phony, and is no friend of our incredible Movement to, MAKE SOUTH CAROLINA, AND AMERICA, GREAT AGAIN!To our amazing South Carolina MAGA Patriots: Please make sure to get out and vote AGAINST “RINO” David Pascoe in the June Republican Primary for Attorney General, and make sure he never holds Elected Office again. THANK YOU SOUTH CAROLINA — MAGA2026!
socialMedia.textZh: 我爱伟大的南卡罗来纳州，在那里赢得了每一场比赛，且只希望在公职中代表你们的最好的人！在棕榈州有一个名叫大卫·帕斯科的RINO候选人，他是终身民主党人，曾公开支持腐败的乔·拜登担任总统，并在南卡罗来纳州担任拜登的联合主席，现在正在共和党初选中竞选你们的下一个检察长——帕斯科是一个彻头彻尾的骗子和伪君子，根本不是我们伟大运动的朋友，来让南卡罗来纳州和美国再次伟大！致我们了不起的南卡罗来纳州MAGA爱国者：请确保在6月的共和党初选中投票反对“RINO”大卫·帕斯科，并确保他再也无法担任公职。谢谢你，南卡罗来纳州——MAGA2026！

socialMedia.text: It is my Great Honor to endorse MAGA Warrior, Kenny Cody, who is running to represent the fantastic people of Tennessee’s 11th State House District.A very successful School Teacher, Civic Leader, Conservative Journalist and Activist, Kenny has dedicated his life to serving his Community. In the State House, he will fight tirelessly to Promote East Tennessee’s “Mountain Values,” Grow the Economy, Cut Taxes and Regulations, Advance MADE IN THE U.S.A., Champion American Energy DOMINANCE, Stop Migrant Crime, Strengthen our Military/Veterans, Promote School Choice, Safeguard our Elections, and Defend our always under siege Second Amendment.Kenny Cody has my Complete and Total Endorsement to be the next State Representative from Tennessee’s 11th House District – HE WILL NEVER LET YOU DOWN!
socialMedia.textZh: 我非常荣幸地支持MAGA战士肯尼·科迪，他正在竞选代表田纳西州第11州众议院区的杰出人民。作为一名非常成功的学校教师、公民领袖、保守派记者和活动家，肯尼将一生奉献给服务他的社区。在州众议院，他将不懈努力，促进东田纳西州的“山地价值观”，发展经济，减税和放松监管，推动美国制造，倡导美国能源主导地位，制止移民犯罪，加强我们的军队/退伍军人，促进学校选择，保护我们的选举，捍卫我们始终受到攻击的第二修正案。肯尼·科迪获得我对田纳西州第11众议院区下一个州代表的完全和全力支持——他绝不会让你失望！

socialMedia.text: Big Vote today (48-1!) in the Energy and Commerce Committee on a Bill including The Sunshine Protection Act, which will be making Daylight Saving Time Permanent! This is so important in that Hundreds of Millions of Dollars are spent every year by people, Cities, and States, being forced to change their Clocks. Many of these Clocks are located in Towers, and the cost of renting, or using, Heavy Equipment to do this twice a year is prohibitive! The House will be attaching The Sunshine Protection Act to “The Highway Bill.” Great work by Troy Nehls, and all of the Members who voted, as well, for Railway Safety. I am going to work very hard to see The Sunshine Protection Act signed into Law. It’s time that people can stop worrying about the “Clock,” not to mention all of the work and money that is spent on this ridiculous, twice yearly production. It will also be a very nice WIN for the Republican Party. Take it! We are going with the far more popular alternative, Saving Daylight, which gives you a longer, brighter Day — And who can be against that — This is an easy one! Thank you to everyone who supported this important Bill, and especially Chairman Brett Guthrie and Vern Buchanan. President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 今天在能源和商业委员会进行了一次重要投票（48-1！），关于包括《阳光保护法》的法案，该法案将使夏令时永久化！这非常重要，因为每年有数亿美元被迫花费在改变时钟上。许多这些时钟位于塔楼中，租用或使用重型设备每年两次进行此操作的费用是 prohibitive！众议院将把《阳光保护法》附加到“公路法案”上。特洛伊·内尔斯和所有投票支持铁路安全的成员做得很好。我将非常努力地推动《阳光保护法》成为法律。是时候让人们不再担心“时钟”，更不用说每年两次在这个荒谬的生产上花费的所有工作和金钱。这也将是共和党的一个非常好的胜利。接受它！我们将选择更受欢迎的替代方案，拯救日光，给你一个更长、更明亮的白天——谁能反对呢——这很简单！感谢所有支持这项重要法案的人，特别是主席布雷特·古思里和弗恩·布坎南。总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: It is my Great Honor to endorse America First Patriot, Derek Merrin, who is running to represent the wonderful people of Ohio’s 9th Congressional District!Derek is running against a Radical Left Democrat, and Career Politician, named Marcy Kaptur, who tried to raise Taxes by over $4 Trillion Dollars, and voted against ALL of our Tax Cuts, including NO TAX ON TIPS, NO TAX ON SOCIAL SECURITY, and NO TAX ON OVERTIME. Marcy Kaptur wants to abolish our Borders, stop deporting Criminal Illegal Aliens, and supports dangerous “Soft on Crime” Policies like cashless bail that let repeat Violent Criminals roam free on our streets. She voted to allow Men in Women’s Sports, is in favor of the transgender mutilization of children, and voted AGAINST Voter I.D., but in favor of allowing Illegal Aliens to vote in our Sacred Elections. She is Reckless, Radical, and Dangerous!In contrast, as a Highly Successful State Legislator, Waterville City Councilman, and Civic Leader, prior to running for U.S. Congress, Derek Merrin has dedicated his life to serving his Community. As your next Congressman, he will fight hard to Grow our Economy, Cut Taxes and Regulations, Promote MADE IN THE U.S.A., Keep our Border SECURE, Stop Migrant Crime, Strengthen our Brave Military/Veterans, Ensure PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH, and Defend our always under siege Second Amendment.Derek Merrin has my Complete and Total Endorsement to be the next Representative from Ohio’s 9th Congressional District – HE WILL NEVER LET YOU DOWN!
socialMedia.textZh: 我非常荣幸地支持美国优先的爱国者德里克·梅林，他正在竞选代表俄亥俄州第9国会选区的优秀人民！德里克正在与一位激进的左翼民主党人和职业政治家玛西·卡普图尔竞争，她试图将税收提高超过4万亿美元，并投票反对我们所有的减税，包括小费免税、社会保障免税和加班免税。玛西·卡普图尔想要废除我们的边界，停止驱逐犯罪的非法移民，并支持危险的“软对犯罪”政策，如无现金保释，让重复的暴力犯罪分子在我们的街道上逍遥法外。她投票允许男性参加女性运动，支持对儿童的变性 mutilization，并投票反对选民身份证，但支持允许非法移民在我们神圣的选举中投票。她是鲁莽、激进和危险的！相比之下，作为一名非常成功的州立法者、沃特维尔市议员和公民领袖，在竞选国会之前，德里克·梅林将一生奉献给服务他的社区。作为你们的下一个国会议员，他将努力发展我们的经济，减税和放松监管，推动美国制造，确保我们的边界安全，制止移民犯罪，加强我们勇敢的军队/退伍军人，确保通过实力实现和平，捍卫我们始终受到攻击的第二修正案。德里克·梅林获得我对俄亥俄州第9国会选区下一个代表的完全和全力支持——他绝不会让你失望！

socialMedia.text: Watch for the Christopher Columbus Memorial Circle Fountain, by Union Station, opening soon! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 请关注即将开放的克里斯托弗·哥伦布纪念圆环喷泉，位于联合车站！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: Based on the successful Election of the now President of Poland, Karol Nawrocki, who I was proud to Endorse, and our relationship with him, I am pleased to announce that the United States will be sending an additional 5,000 Troops to Poland. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 基于现在波兰总统卡罗尔·纳夫罗基的成功选举，我很自豪地支持他，并与他建立了良好的关系，我很高兴地宣布美国将向波兰派遣额外的5000名军队。感谢您对此事的关注！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: Thank you to the great Troy Nehls for fighting for the Citizens of East Palestine, Railway Safety, and my Agenda. I am calling on Transportation Committee Republicans to support his Railway Safety Act Amendment, which is going to be voted on very soon. I have supported the Bill since 2023, and we need to get it done! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 感谢伟大的特洛伊·内尔斯为东巴勒斯坦市民、铁路安全和我的议程而奋斗。我呼吁交通委员会的共和党人支持他的铁路安全法案修正案，该修正案将很快进行投票。我自2023年以来一直支持这项法案，我们需要完成它！感谢您对此事的关注。总统唐纳德·J·特朗普
